title: hieracium aestivum subsp. pruiniferum
intro: Hieracium aestivum subsp. pruiniferum, also known as rough hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium aestivum subsp. pruiniferum include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's roots and leaves to make a tincture.
